generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor embedded in physical building collecting real-time temperature data for DT synchronization. Part of TwinLight and BOREALIS projects for dynamic control policy refinement."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring relative humidity levels in building zones, integrated with BCS for environmental control optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motion/PIR sensor detecting occupancy patterns in rooms, providing real-time occupancy data for adaptive control systems."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lux meter measuring ambient light levels to enable adaptive lighting control strategies in the DT framework."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart meter measuring real-time energy consumption across building systems, integrated with time-series databases for operational analytics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance BASControllerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Automation System sensor interfacing with HVAC and lighting controllers, providing system state data for DT synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData BASControllerDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data stream from IoT sensors, normalized via Eclipse Hono and semantically modeled with Eclipse Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Relative humidity measurements transmitted via event-driven protocols to the DT middleware layer."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Occupancy events and patterns collected from motion sensors, used for dynamic control policy adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Ambient light level measurements enabling adaptive lighting control in the DT framework."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Time-series energy consumption data from smart meters, stored in InfluxDB for historical analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMeter
]

instance BASControllerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Building control system state data transmitted via middleware protocols for real-time synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BASControllerSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimStaticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched 3D building model containing geometric, spatial, and functional data (component relationships, material properties) from Autodesk Revit."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BimToRuntimeTransformer, UnrealEngine5Integration
]

instance BcsRuntimeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured representation of BCS components (sensors, actuators, controllers) extracted from BIM and mapped to Eclipse Hono/Ditto schemas."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoSemanticModeler, ControlLogicDeployer
]

instance OperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data streams from IoT sensors and historical energy logs stored in time-series databases."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, LightDataTransmitted, EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimeSeriesDatabase, ReinforcementLearningOptimizer
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific models for lighting control policies and reinforcement learning agents embedded in BIM for automated deployment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlLogicDeployer
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 assets including 3D textures and interactive UI elements for immersive building monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Integration
]

instance HistoricalEnergyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical energy consumption logs from building systems, used for trend analysis and predictive maintenance."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimeSeriesDatabase
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BimToRuntimeTransformer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tool automating extraction of BIM semantics and generation of runtime interfaces via M2M/M2T transformations."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedDeploymentService
]

instance DittoSemanticModeler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto framework providing semantic data modeling and standardized interfaces for device integration in the DT."
]

instance HonoIoTIngestor : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware for real-time IoT data ingestion and bidirectional communication between DT and physical systems."
]

instance TimeSeriesDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Database system storing operational data streams and historical records for time-series analysis."
]

instance UnrealEngine5Integration : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization engine providing interactive 3D monitoring and simulation capabilities for building operations."
]

instance ControlLogicDeployer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tool automating deployment of control logic models from BIM to operational systems."
]

instance ReinforcementLearningOptimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Library implementing reinforcement learning algorithms for adaptive control policies (e.g., BOREALIS energy optimization)."
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing live visualization of building operations through Unreal Engine 5 immersive interface."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingOperationsVisualization, EnvironmentalConditionInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service leveraging reinforcement learning to optimize energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimization, ComfortLevelRecommendation
]

instance AutomatedDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling automated deployment of DTs from BIM models including device modeling and runtime interface generation."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentAutomation
]

instance MaintenanceSchedulingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing predictive maintenance alerts based on sensor data anomalies and equipment performance degradation."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceAlert, EquipmentHealthInsight
]

instance ScenarioSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service simulating operational scenarios (e.g., energy usage under different occupancy patterns) for design validation."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyUsageSimulation, OccupancyPatternAnalysis
]

instance ComplianceAssessmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating automated LEED/energy code compliance reports derived from DT data."
    DTDFVocab:provides ComplianceReport, RegulatoryInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingOperationsVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of real-time building operations for facility managers in Unreal Engine 5 environment."
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time reports on temperature, humidity, and occupancy patterns across building zones."
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "AI-driven recommendations for energy-efficient operational adjustments based on real-time data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ComfortLevelRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Suggestions for HVAC and lighting setpoints to optimize visual comfort and non-visual health effects."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Proactive notifications for equipment failures or performance degradation based on sensor data anomalies."
]

instance EquipmentHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of equipment health metrics derived from operational data streams."
]

instance EnergyUsageSimulation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "What-if analysis results showing impact of different operational scenarios on energy consumption."
]

instance OccupancyPatternAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Trend analysis of occupancy patterns to inform space utilization and control policy optimization."
]

instance ComplianceReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated assessment of building performance against LEED and energy code requirements."
]

instance RegulatoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of potential regulatory compliance issues based on real-time operational data."
]

instance AdaptiveLightingControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting systems based on occupancy and ambient light conditions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyEfficientHVACAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic modification of HVAC setpoints to optimize energy consumption while maintaining comfort levels."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control system actuator for lighting fixtures enabling adaptive control strategies derived from DT recommendations."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuators (dampers, valves) controlled via DT-generated optimization policies for energy efficiency."
]

instance BuildingControlGateway : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT gateway interfacing between DT control logic and physical building systems via standardized protocols."
]

// Additional Services to resolve missing references
instance DataNormalizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service responsible for normalizing and standardizing data from various sources for consistent processing."
]

instance RealTimeDataIngestion : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling real-time data ingestion from IoT devices and physical systems."
]

instance HistoricalDataAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing historical data to identify trends and patterns for predictive insights."
]

instance ImmersiveMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive monitoring capabilities through 3D visualization interfaces."
]

instance AutomatedCommissioning : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating the commissioning process of building systems based on DT models."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing energy optimization strategies based on real-time and historical data."
]

instance DeploymentAutomation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated deployment of digital twin components and configurations."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** is enabled through **bidirectional communication channels** established between the DT and the physical building’s BCS. The DT generates **control signals** (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) based on **optimization algorithms** (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS) or **user-defined rules** (e.g., energy-saving policies). These signals are transmitted back to the physical infrastructure via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto interfaces**, which act as middleware to translate virtual commands into executable actions on actuators (e.g., dimming lights, adjusting thermostats). The framework ensures **low-latency synchronization** to maintain alignment between the DT’s virtual state and the PT’s physical state."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time-scale** is **real-time** for **operational synchronization** between the DT and the physical building, with updates occurring at **sub-second to millisecond intervals** for critical sensor data (e.g., occupancy, environmental conditions). For **control actions** (e.g., lighting adjustments), the latency is optimized to ensure **near-instantaneous response** (typically <100ms). The framework also supports **batch processing** for non-critical data (e.g., energy consumption logs) with **hourly or daily updates**. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the **temporal fidelity** of the DT’s synchronization with the PT."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **DT constellation** is structured as a **modular, service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  1. **BIM Core**: The **semantic backbone** providing **static and dynamic building data**.
  2. **Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for **real-time data exchange** and **device integration**.
  3. **Control Layer**: **BCS components** (e.g., sensors, actuators) and **control logic** (e.g., reinforcement learning agents).
  4. **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** for **interactive 3D monitoring**.
  5. **Service Layer**: **Customizable services** (e.g., optimization, maintenance) integrated via **standardized extension points**.
  6. **Deployment Orchestrator**: Automates the **model-to-runtime transformation** pipeline, reducing manual effort.
  The constellation supports **scalable deployment** by allowing **independent extension of services** while maintaining **interoperability** through standardized interfaces."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The **life-cycle stages** covered by the DT include:
  1. **Design phase**: The DT leverages **BIM models** to represent the **as-designed** state of the building, including geometric, spatial, and functional attributes.
  2. **Construction phase**: The DT supports **clash detection, progress tracking, and as-built documentation** by integrating **real-time construction data** (e.g., sensor feedback from construction sites).
  3. **Operational phase**: The DT enables **real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control** by synchronizing with **operational data** (e.g., sensor inputs, energy usage).
  4. **Refurbishment/Adaptation phase**: The DT facilitates **life-cycle optimization** by simulating the impact of **renovations or retrofits** before physical implementation.
  The framework ensures **continuity** across phases by maintaining **semantic consistency** between BIM models and runtime data, as demonstrated in the **Living Lab case study**."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **fidelity and validity considerations** include:
  - **Semantic Coherence**: Ensured through **BIM’s standardized data schemas** and **MDE-based transformations**, reducing **semantic drift** between the DT and PT.
  - **Real-time Synchronization**: Validated using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which quantifies the **alignment** between virtual and physical states.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: The framework accounts for **sensor inaccuracies** and **communication delays** by incorporating **probabilistic models** (e.g., Bayesian inference) into control logic.
  - **Verification and Validation (V&V)**: Includes **automated model validation** (e.g., checking for missing device metadata) and **manual reviews** by domain experts (e.g., building control engineers).
  - **Error Recovery**: Mechanisms for **detecting and correcting discrepancies** (e.g., resynchronizing the DT after a sensor failure) are embedded in the middleware layer."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **DT technical connection** relies on:
  - **Network Protocols**: **MQTT** (via Eclipse Hono) for **lightweight, real-time IoT data transmission** and **HTTP/REST** for **configuration management**.
  - **Middleware Architecture**: **Eclipse Hono** acts as a **protocol adapter**, supporting **bidirectional communication** between the DT and physical devices, while **Ditto** provides **semantic interoperability** via **digital twin models**.
  - **Data Serialization**: Uses **JSON-LD** for **structured data exchange** and **CBOR** for **compact, efficient transmission** of sensor data.
  - **Security**: Implements **TLS encryption** for **secure data transmission** and **OAuth 2.0** for **authentication/authorization**.
  The architecture ensures **low-latency, high-reliability connections** between the DT and PT, with **failover mechanisms** for redundant data paths."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **DT hosting/deployment** is implemented as a **cloud-native, microservices-based architecture**, with the following technical aspects:
  - **Cloud Infrastructure**: Deployed on **containerized platforms** (e.g., Kubernetes) for **scalability** and **high availability**.
  - **Edge Computing**: Supports **partial deployment on edge devices** (e.g., IoT gateways) to reduce latency for **time-critical operations** (e.g., emergency lighting control).
  - **Hybrid Deployment**: Combines **centralized cloud services** (e.g., Ditto’s digital twin registry) with **on-premise components** (e.g., local BCS controllers).
  - **Automated CI/CD Pipelines**: Enables **continuous integration and deployment** of DT updates, ensuring **rapid iteration** and **minimal downtime**.
  - **Resource Management**: Uses **auto-scaling** to handle **peak loads** (e.g., during large-scale sensor data ingestion)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The **horizontal integration** with external systems is enabled through:
  - **Standardized APIs**: RESTful and **GraphQL endpoints** for **data exchange** with **ERP systems**, **CMMS (Computerized Maintenance Management Systems)**, and **energy management platforms**.
  - **BIM Integration**: **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** and **BCF (BIM Collaboration Format)** for **interoperability** with other **AEC tools** (e.g., Revit, Navisworks).
  - **IoT Platforms**: **MQTT brokers** (e.g., Eclipse Mosquitto) for **cross-platform sensor data aggregation**.
  - **Cloud Services**: **Azure IoT Hub** or **AWS IoT Core** for **scalable integration** with third-party IoT ecosystems.
  The framework ensures **semantic alignment** with external systems via **ontology-based mappings** (e.g., linking BIM elements to IoT device schemas)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "The **data ownership and privacy** considerations are addressed through:
  - **Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)**: Defines **permissions** for stakeholders (e.g., facility managers, DT engineers) based on their roles.
  - **Data Encryption**: **End-to-end encryption** (e.g., TLS 1.3) for **data in transit** and **field-level encryption** for **sensitive data at rest**.
  - **GDPR Compliance**: **Anonymization techniques** for **occupancy data** and **pseudonymization** for **user tracking** in public spaces.
  - **Ownership Clarity**: **Contractual agreements** specify whether **data ownership** resides with the **building owner**, **DT service provider**, or **third-party vendors**.
  - **Audit Logging**: **Immutable logs** of data access and modifications to ensure **transparency** and **accountability**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The **standardization** efforts in the framework include:
  - **BIM Standards**: Adherence to **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** and **COBie (Construction Operations Building Information Exchange)** for **data exchange**.
  - **IoT Standards**: Compliance with **OPC UA** for **industrial IoT integration** and **MQTT** for **lightweight messaging**.
  - **Digital Twin Standards**: Alignment with **DMTF’s Open Digital Twin Standards** and **Eclipse Ditto’s digital twin models**.
  - **Middleware Standards**: Use of **Eclipse Hono’s IoT protocols** and **Ditto’s semantic data models** for **interoperability**.
  - **Model-Driven Standards**: **OMG’s Model-Driven Architecture (MDA)** for **model transformations** and **QVT (Query/View/Transformation)** for **model consistency checks**.
  The framework ensures **vendor-neutral interoperability** by avoiding proprietary formats and leveraging **open-source tools** (e.g., Eclipse projects)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The **security and safety considerations** include:
  - **Cybersecurity Measures**:
    - **Network Segmentation**: Isolates **DT components** from **critical infrastructure** to mitigate **cyber-physical attack risks**.
    - **Intrusion Detection**: **AI-based anomaly detection** for **unauthorized access attempts** or **malicious control signals**.
    - **Secure Boot**: **Hardware-rooted trust** for **edge devices** to prevent **firmware tampering**.
  - **Safety Mechanisms**:
    - **Fail-Safe Controls**: **Hardware watchdogs** and **redundant actuators** to ensure **safe operation** even during DT failures.
    - **Human-in-the-Loop**: **Manual override capabilities** for **critical safety-critical systems** (e.g., emergency exits).
    - **Real-Time Monitoring**: **Continuous validation** of DT-to-PT commands to prevent **unsafe actions** (e.g., conflicting control signals).
  - **Compliance**: Adherence to **ISO/IEC 27001** for **information security** and **IEC 62443** for **industrial cybersecurity**.
  - **Remote Operation Safeguards**: **Geofencing** and **biometric authentication** for **remote access** to prevent **unauthorized physical interventions**."
]
